title: Find help to adjust as a refugee in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Find help to adjust as a refugee in Canada
Find out what it’s like to resettle to Canada.
This video is also available in HD on YouTube .
As a newcomer to Canada, you’re eligible for help under the
- Resettlement Assistance Program (RAP)
There are different programs and services available to help you become a participating member of Canadian society as quickly as possible.
RAP gives government-assisted refugees immediate and essential supports for their most basic needs. These services include
- loans to help you travel to Canada
- greeting you at the airport
- providing temporary housing
- help with learning about and adjusting to your new community finding permanent housing registering for essential federal and provincial programs personal finance, such as budgeting and setting up a bank account
- learning about and adjusting to your new community
- finding permanent housing
- registering for essential federal and provincial programs
- personal finance, such as budgeting and setting up a bank account
- offering Canadian life skills training for refugees with high needs
- referrals to community programs or other programs for newcomers
If you’re being sponsored to come to Canada, your sponsoring group will provide you with these services.
All refugees who are resettled to Canada can also access settlement program services. These include
- information and orientation
- referral to community resources
- translation and interpretation
- job-related services
Each program and service has its own eligibility requirements. If you were sponsored as a refugee, contact your sponsoring organization to find out about settlement assistance. You can also get information on resettlement and settlement assistance by contacting a service organization directly.

## Resettlement Assistance Program service provider organizations
To find a service provider organization (SPO):
- Step 1: Select the province/territory. A list of all the SPO in that province/territory will appear.
- Step 2: To search for a specific SPO, type in any key words (partial name, city, address, postal code, etc) in the Filter Items box.
